source_jobs.title: Consumer Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
Leland is building the home for ambition in the age of AI. We connect people with the experts, programs, and communities they need to land the job, get into the school, or upskill for a world being rewritten by AI. We help businesses become AI-native through training, hiring, and infrastructure. Since our founding in 2021, we've helped tens of thousands of people reach their most ambitious goals and raised $19M from world-class investors. Ambition is sacred to us, and we've built a product that takes that seriously.

We’re looking for a talented sales professional who will be instrumental in scaling our consumer sales efforts and driving the growth of our business. You will manage the entire sales process from sign up to purchase for thousands of customers. If you are interested in sales and growth, working with an experienced team, joining a well-funded high-growth startup, and making a meaningful impact in the world, we’d love to chat.



WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING:

 - Consistently achieve monthly revenue targets through sales

 - Oversee the sales lifecycle for Leland clients from sign up to booking a course and/or 1:1 coaching

 - Help build a strong sales pipeline through outreach and other marketing channels

 - Develop a strong knowledge of the 30+ featured coaching categories on the Leland platform (e.g., PM, Consulting, IB, College, MBA, etc.)

 - Build trust with prospective clients and assist them with finding the right expert(s) and offering(s) that will help them accomplish their ambitious goals

 - Build winning playbooks, trainings materials, and other resources to help the team succeed

 - Contribute to our team culture by fostering an inclusive and collaborative environment
   
   


YOUR SKILLS AND EXPERIENCE:

 - You are passionate about selling and driving business growth

 - You have experience with or a knowledge of recruiting for IB, VC, PE, PM, etc. and/or applying to graduate school (MBA, Law School, Med School, etc.)

 - You are an outstanding communicator with excellent people skills

 - You are a team player and will strive to find ways to make our team win

 - You are scrappy and willing to get into the weeds

 - You are customer-centric and passionate about ensuring client success

 - You are motivated by goals and are a high achiever

 - BA or BS degree


WHY LELAND?

 - The chance to join a world-class team helping people achieve their career and educational dreams

 - Work in a collaborative, high-energy environment where your contributions have a direct impact

 - Operate in a fast-paced, AI-native environment

 - We don't hire people who merely want to work for a great company; we hire people who want to make a great company


Leland is an equal opportunity employer. We encourage candidates of all backgrounds and demographics to apply.

source_jobs.title: Growth Manager, Organic
source_jobs.description:
Leland is building the home for ambition in the age of AI. We connect people with the experts, programs, and communities they need to land the job, get into the school, or upskill for a world being rewritten by AI. We help businesses become AI-native through training, hiring, and infrastructure. Since our founding in 2021, we've helped tens of thousands of people reach their most ambitious goals and raised $19M from world-class investors. Ambition is sacred to us, and we've built a product that takes that seriously.

We're looking to add an ambitious Growth Manager to our hard-working growth team. This person will take ownership of all of Leland's organic channels, primarily focusing on establishing the organic social function. If you are an aggressive, creative, and driven executor who wants to build a killer organic growth engine and team, you will love this role. Leland is growing very quickly and we are on a mission to help everyone reach their career and educational goals.

Responsibilities

 - Build and optimize scalable content systems and teams to amplify the Leland brand

 - Own and >10x existing social growth channels leveraging AI, tools, contractors, etc.

 - Identify and experiment with new social growth channels, content types, viral loops, and tactics

 - Dive deep into platform ecosystems and algorithms to determine winning strategies

 - Leverage data to measure results, learn quickly, and iterate on what's effective

 - Work cross-functionally across the growth, product, and operations teams to support broader growth initiatives

 - Help craft Leland's brand, voice, and reputation online

Qualifications

 - Experience in marketing, content, growth, consulting, strategy or similar roles

 - Strong writing and storytelling skills

 - Deep understanding of or desire to learn platform algorithms, content formats, and what drives organic distribution

 - Data-driven approach to content: you set goals, measure performance, and iterate quickly

 - Rigorous testing mentality: you form hypotheses, run structured experiments, and use results to drive decisions rather than gut alone

 - High-agency owner who takes full accountability for outcomes, moves without waiting for permission, and finds a way to get things done

 - Thrives in a fast-moving, ambiguous environment and can prioritize without much hand-holding


WHY LELAND?

 - The chance to join a world-class team helping people achieve their career and educational dreams

 - Work in a collaborative, high-energy environment where your contributions have a direct impact

 - Operate in a fast-paced, AI-native environment

 - We don't hire people who merely want to work for a great company; we hire people who want to make a great company


Leland is an equal opportunity employer. We encourage candidates of all backgrounds and demographics to apply.

source_jobs.title: GRE Tutor
source_jobs.description:
Leland is building the home for ambition in the age of AI. We connect people with the experts, programs, and communities they need to land the job, get into the school, or upskill for a world being rewritten by AI. We help businesses become AI-native through training, hiring, and infrastructure. Since our founding in 2021, we've helped tens of thousands of people reach their most ambitious goals and raised $19M from world-class investors. Ambition is sacred to us, and we've built a product that takes that seriously.

We’re looking for an experienced GRE tutor to support students preparing for the exam across both Quantitative and Verbal sections. This role involves working 1:1 with learners to assess strengths and gaps, build customized study plans, teach core concepts and test-taking strategies, and track progress toward target scores. Ideal candidates have a strong GRE score (typically 90th percentile+), prior tutoring or teaching experience, and the ability to explain complex ideas clearly while keeping students motivated and accountable. Tutors set their own schedules and rates, deliver sessions virtually, and collaborate with our team to ensure a high-quality student experience.


WHY LELAND?

 - The chance to join a world-class team helping people achieve their career and educational dreams

 - Work in a collaborative, high-energy environment where your contributions have a direct impact

 - Operate in a fast-paced, AI-native environment

 - We don't hire people who merely want to work for a great company; we hire people who want to make a great company

source_jobs.title: AI Education Intern
source_jobs.description:
Leland is building the home for ambition in the age of AI. We connect people with the experts, programs, and communities they need to land the job, get into the school, or upskill for a world being rewritten by AI. We help businesses become AI-native through training, hiring, and infrastructure. Since our founding in 2021, we've helped tens of thousands of people reach their most ambitious goals and raised $19M from world-class investors. Ambition is sacred to us, and we've built a product that takes that seriously.

We're looking for sharp, AI-native builders to join us as AI Education Interns and help run one of the most ambitious AI training programs in the market. This isn't a shadow-and-learn internship. You'll facilitate live sessions for working professionals, keep curriculum current as AI tools evolve, and help build the systems that power the whole program. If you are an AI enthusiast, can execute without hand-holding, and are able to explain hard concepts simply, we want to talk with you.

What you'll be doing:

 - Supporting live AI Builder Program https://ai.joinleland.com/ sessions as an instructor's assistant for cohorts of working professionals

 - QA-ing sessions before they go live and improving curriculum between cohorts as AI tools change

 - Supporting students in Slack, during office hours, and through live troubleshooting

 - Building and maintaining AI automations and systems that power program delivery

 - Helping design new sessions and levels as we expand to Levels 3-5 and bring on B2B custom cohorts

Your qualifications:

 - Currently enrolled in or recently graduated from a college program

 - AI-native: you've built automations, workflows, or tools, not just used AI assistants

 - Can explain complex technical concepts clearly to a room of non-technical professionals

 - Available to work 40 hours per week in-person in Lehi, UT office 5 days per week

Your identity:

 - High-agency operator who doesn't wait to be told what to do

 - AI-native builder who actively creates automations and uses AI to move faster and do more

 - Clear communicator who can make hard things click for people who didn't grow up in tech

 - Fast mover who's comfortable with ambiguity and iterates fast

 - Scrappy and gritty, not afraid of the unglamorous work required to actually win

 - Energetic self-starter whose instinct is to figure it out, not ask for permission

 - Patient and collaborative problem-solver with customers learning new technology


What this role unlocks:
Strong AI Education Interns become top candidates for full-time roles on Leland AI Services, where companies hire us to come in and implement AI for their teams. Being an intern working on the AI Builder Program is the best training ground we know of for that path. You'll understand AI tools at a depth most professionals never reach, and you'll have real sessions, real students, and real results to prove it.




WHY LELAND?

 - The chance to join a world-class team helping people achieve their career and educational dreams

 - Work in a collaborative, high-energy environment where your contributions have a direct impact

 - Operate in a fast-paced, AI-native environment

 - We don't hire people who merely want to work for a great company; we hire people who want to make a great company


Leland is an equal opportunity employer. We encourage candidates of all backgrounds and demographics to apply.

source_jobs.description:
Leland is building the home for ambition in the age of AI. We connect people with the experts, programs, and communities they need to land the job, get into the school, or upskill for a world being rewritten by AI. We help businesses become AI-native through training, hiring, and infrastructure. Since our founding in 2021, we've helped tens of thousands of people reach their most ambitious goals and raised $19M from world-class investors. Ambition is sacred to us, and we've built a product that takes that seriously.

We're looking for a high-agency Ops Lead to run the engine behind Leland's live AI education programs.

You'll own the operational machine that makes our AI Builder Program https://ai.joinleland.com/ + other AI offerings best-in-class. If you're an AI-native operator who's organized, comfortable with chaos, and ready to work like a founder, we want you on the team.

The core AI education offering today is our AI Builder Program (5 levels, designed to help anyone build with AI). We're rapidly expanding to offer more specialized AI tracks and custom cohorts for companies.

You’ll be responsible for managing all day-to-day operations necessary to keep all AI education programs running. We expect you to have a consistent focus on improving the offering, driving real outcomes for customers, and on building an AI-first system that can scale.

What you'll be doing:

 - Running cohort delivery end-to-end: enrollment, schedules, Slack channels, instructor handoffs, student comms, peer review, demo days. It's your job to make sure nothing falls through the cracks.

 - Owning the curriculum product: manage session guides, slides, and help docs from draft through shipping to the live system across multiple programs at once.

 - Designing, creating, and improving curriculum materials

 - Building your own AI-powered automations and workflows to move faster: Notion task boards, n8n flows, AI agents in Claude Code. If a workflow is manual, you automate it.

 - Drafting student-facing comms in Leland's voice: emails, texts, Slack posts, reminders.

 - Managing and coordinating instructors, TAs, and peer reviewers so they stay unblocked and on schedule.

 - Screening, hiring, and onboarding new instructors and TAs

 - Planning program operations weeks to months in advance, making sure we have the staffing, infrastructure, and curriculum needed to run programs.

 - Teaching select AI education sessions so you understand what good instruction looks like and how to enable instructors to teach effectively.

Your qualifications:

 - Entry-level through mid-level; 2 to 5 years of professional experience in product management, operations, education, AI, or project management

 - AI-native operator who actively creates their own automations and uses AI tools to get leverage; not just a user, but a builder

 - Strong ops and project management skills: Notion, project tracking, sequencing complex work, managing stakeholders effectively

 - Education or instructional design background: you've built curriculum, run cohorts, and taught before

 - Clear, confident writing: you can draft student-facing copy that sounds like a human, not a corporate blast

 - Available full-time, in-person in the Lehi office (in-person every weekday)

Your identity:

 - High-agency owner who sees a problem and fixes it without waiting for permission

 - AI-native builder who actively creates automations to give yourself leverage

 - Excellent writer and communicator, can manage both internal and customer communications

 - Extremely organized operator who can manage dozens of moving pieces without letting anything slip through the cracks

 - Scrappy and gritty, not afraid to do the unglamorous work required to ship a great cohort

 - Clear thinker who can prioritize the right things and defend those priorities

Why Leland?

 - Real ownership of the operational machine behind Leland's most important live programs

 - Opportunity to work with and learn from experts

source_jobs.title: GM, Marketplace
source_jobs.description:
Leland is building the home for ambition in the age of AI. We connect people with the experts, programs, and communities they need to land the job, get into the school, or upskill for a world being rewritten by AI. We help businesses become AI-native through training, hiring, and infrastructure. Since our founding in 2021, we've helped tens of thousands of people reach their most ambitious goals and raised $19M from world-class investors. Ambition is sacred to us, and we've built a product that takes that seriously.

We're looking for a high-agency operator to own a large, two-sided marketplace at the intersection of education, career development, and expert knowledge. You'll run the supply and demand engine across one of the broadest category footprints in the space, and increasingly with both human and AI experts serving customers.




THE OPPORTUNITY

Leland is a marketplace where ambitious people find the experts and services they need to reach goals that actually matter. Getting into Harvard Business School. Landing a McKinsey offer. Passing the LSAT. Breaking into investment banking. Acing the MCAT. Pivoting into product management. Upskilling in AI to stay ahead in a fast-moving market.

The category footprint is wide: MBA admissions, management consulting, private equity, investment banking, product management, law school, medical school, dental school, college admissions, master's programs, PhD programs, executive coaching, leadership development, career coaching, AI strategy, GMAT, GRE, LSAT, SAT, MCAT, USMLE, and dozens more, with thousands of customers working with Leland experts every month across all of them.

The Marketplace GM owns the full business. That means owning supply (the quality, quantity, and activation of the expert network) and demand (the customers who come to Leland to find them). It also means expanding into new categories, developing enterprise partnerships (including early deals deploying AI experts for large-scale workforce upskilling), and finding the growth vectors that compound the platform over time.

This is already an eight-figure business. The next GM takes it further.

High ownership. Real P&L. Reporting to our Head of GMs.




WHAT YOU'LL OWN

Expert Supply. The marketplace is only as good as the experts on it. You'll own the strategy for recruiting, vetting, activating, and retaining a high-quality bench of experts across every category, human and AI alike, because more great experts in more categories means more reasons for customers to come, stay, and refer.

Customer Demand. You'll own how customers find Leland, why they convert, and how well they're served — understanding the acquisition funnel, optimizing conversion across categories, and ensuring the customer experience drives retention and word of mouth.

Category Expansion. Leland currently serves 50+ categories spanning career development, school admissions, and test prep. There are more to open, and you'll identify where the demand exists, recruit the supply to serve it, and launch new categories with urgency.

Enterprise. An early-stage but high-potential channel. Companies are coming to Leland to deploy AI-delivered services for workforce upskilling and outplacement at scale. You'll develop and grow this motion alongside the core marketplace.




WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR


MARKETPLACE OPERATOR

You understand how two-sided markets work. You know that supply and demand both need dedicated attention, that the unit economics matter, and that growth comes from finding the right lever and pressing hard. You've done this before: at a startup, a marketplace company, or somewhere you had to figure it out yourself.

Ideal backgrounds include:

 - GM, operator, or founder at a marketplace or platform business

 - Revenue or growth leader at an edtech, coaching, or content company

 - Early operator at a high-growth startup who owned a P&L or a major business line


COMMERCIALLY SHARP

You've owned a number and moved it — carrying a q

source_jobs.title: Recruiting Intern
source_jobs.description:
Leland is building the home for ambition in the age of AI. We connect people with the experts, programs, and communities they need to land the job, get into the school, or upskill for a world being rewritten by AI. We help businesses become AI-native through training, hiring, and infrastructure. Since our founding in 2021, we've helped tens of thousands of people reach their most ambitious goals and raised $19M from world-class investors. Ambition is sacred to us, and we've built a product that takes that seriously.

We're hiring a Recruiting Intern to support our Head of People during a period of active growth. You'll spend the majority of your time building and managing talent pools across a range of roles while also owning the intern recruiting process at Leland from end to end. You'll interact directly with members of our leadership team and get an honest look at what it takes to hire well at a growth-stage startup.

This is a great fit for someone who is organized, articulate, and genuinely interested in building high-performing teams. You will report directly to Dalton Brough https://www.linkedin.com/in/daltonbrough/, Head of People.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Build and maintain talent pools to support active searches across the business

 - Own the intern recruiting process end-to-end -- sourcing, screening, and managing the candidate experience

 - Serve as a talent scout for your university, building a network of ambitious students and connecting the best ones to opportunities at Leland

 - Represent Leland on campus and build relationships that feed our early-career pipeline

 - Learn and work in our recruiting and HR systems, including Ashby, Gusto, and Slack

 - Use AI tools (Claude, n8n) to automate repeatable tasks and improve workflows

 - Support office management, event planning, and employee engagement initiatives

 - Assist with People Operations projects as needs arise




WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - Experience in recruiting, sales or other customer-facing position preferred, ideally in a startup environment

 - Currently pursuing a business degree (or related field), with an expected graduation date of 2027 or 2028

 - Strong organizational skills and attention to detail

 - Natural communicator with skills in sales, persuasion, and executive presence; you'll interact with hiring managers and candidates daily

 - Comfortable working in a fast-moving environment with shifting priorities

 - Capable of utilizing AI to automate repeatable work

 - Clear, professional communication, both written and verbal

 - Available to work in-person in Lehi, UT for 40 hours/week during summer and 20+ hours/week during fall/spring semesters




WHY LELAND?

 - The chance to join a world-class team helping people achieve their career and educational dreams

 - Work in a collaborative, high-energy environment where your contributions have a direct impact

 - Operate in a fast-paced, AI-native environment

 - We don't hire people who merely want to work for a great company; we hire people who want to make a great company


Leland is an equal opportunity employer. We encourage candidates of all backgrounds and demographics to apply.

source_jobs.title: VP, Marketing
source_jobs.description:
Leland is building the home for ambition in the age of AI. We connect people with the experts, programs, and communities they need to land the job, get into the school, or upskill for a world being rewritten by AI. We help businesses become AI-native through training, hiring, and infrastructure. Since our founding in 2021, we've helped tens of thousands of people reach their most ambitious goals and raised $19M from world-class investors. Ambition is sacred to us, and we've built a product that takes that seriously.

We are looking for our first VP, Marketing to build the engine that helps us reach more people and businesses. This is a full-ownership role: consumer and B2B, brand to demand gen, strategy to execution. You'll report to our CEO and Founder, John Koelliker https://www.linkedin.com/in/john-koelliker/, build and lead the marketing team, and own the growth number on both sides of the business. We move fast, hold a high bar, and do work that changes people's lives.




WHAT YOU'LL OWN

 - Demand generation across consumer and B2B, with clear ownership of the growth number on both sides

 - Building and leading the marketing team: hiring, developing talent, and setting the performance bar

 - Brand, content, and community strategy, with a strong bias toward channels that actually move the needle

 - Own go-to-market for new products and categories in partnership with product and sales, from positioning and messaging through launch and into pipeline, making sure what we build finds the right customers fast

 - Identify and test new growth channels systematically, from SEO to events to partnerships to community-driven distribution, and scale what proves out

 - The full marketing tech stack, including attribution, analytics, and automation

 - Marketing performance reporting to the CEO and leadership team
   
   


WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - A track record of building scalable marketing engines. You know what it feels like to take a channel or a motion from traction to scale, and you've done it more than once.

 - Genuine experience across both consumer and B2B marketing.

 - You've hired and led talent-dense marketing teams. You invest in the people you lead, and your former reports tend to go on to do great things.

 - A first-principles thinker. You don't pull playbooks off the shelf; you build them for the specific context you're in.

 - Strong commercial instincts. You feel personal ownership over the revenue number and know how your work connects to it.

 - High taste and a strong point of view on what good looks like. You notice when something is off, you care why, and you're not willing to ship work that doesn't clear the bar.

 - An experimental mindset backed by analytical rigor. You run structured tests, move quickly on what the data says, and know the difference between a trend and noise.

 - Bias for action and willingness to be in the weeds. You're not above writing copy, pulling a report, or building a brief yourself.

 - The orientation of a true startup executive. You've built in ambiguous, resource-constrained environments and you understand the job is to figure it out, not wait for more clarity or more headcount.

 - High agency and AI fluency. You know how to get more done with less, and you're already using AI to do it.


WHY LELAND?

 - The chance to join a world-class team helping people achieve their career and educational dreams

 - Work in a collaborative, high-energy environment where your contributions have a direct impact

 - Operate in a fast-paced, AI-native environment

 - We don't hire people who merely want to work for a great company; we hire people who want to make a great company


Leland is an equal opportunity employer. We encourage candidates of all backgrounds and demographics to apply.

notes: Leland is an AI-focused company with a mix of tech and non-tech roles, including coaching and education positions.
